image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder how a tiny fish can hold toxins more than a shark?
Context visual: This is biomagnification—when toxins increase in concentration as they move up the food chain.
Escalation visual: Small organisms absorb pollutants. Then, larger predators eat them, amplifying the toxin levels.
Evidence visual: Studies show that top predators can have toxin levels a thousand times higher than their prey.
Payoff visual: This affects not just wildlife, but also human health through our seafood.
Cta visual: Stay informed about what’s on your plate. Knowledge is power!
